<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] in ('c', 'N', 'W'):
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, bbox=({min(rows)},{min(cols)})-({max(rows)},{max(cols)}), pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
